race.comment: PEANUT BUTTER (1) finished off strongly from the back of the pack but found one better over 1100m at Bunbury. Today's set-up looks to suit him much better and he looks on the cusp of a maiden victory. Finds the right race today and can go one better. SPANISH ARMADA (5) ended last campaign in good order and looks ready to fire on resumption judging by his latest trial. May need some luck from the barrier, but is good enough to land the knockout blow if the breaks come. MIDNIGHT DEAL (10) jumped an equal favourite over 1300m on this course and CJP hops back on board for her return. She moved well in her latest trial and she looks set for a promising return. NEW DISCOVERY (12) was much sharper with the blinkers going on for his latest trial and they stay on for his debut today. Not to be discounted. FORGOTTEN SON (2) is next best.
